name: US Counties
description: Demographic and economic measures for all 3,142 US counties (IMS Ch. 1, 8 relationships).
studyDescription: County-level demographic and economic measures for all 3,142 US counties, compiled by OpenIntro from US Census Bureau and American Community Survey data. An observational, population-level dataset.

variableDescriptions.name: County name.
variableDescriptions.homeownership: Percent of housing units that are owner-occupied.
variableDescriptions.multi_unit: Percent of housing units in multi-unit structures.
variableDescriptions.metro: Whether the county is in a metropolitan area (yes/no).
variableDescriptions.median_edu: Median education level (below_hs / hs_diploma / some_college / bachelors).

sourceDetail: OpenIntro `county`, from the US Census Bureau / American Community Survey (2017).
